name: Eden's Embrace
description: Notes With a great mix of offense and defense, this item proves to be one of the best rings for soloing any existing content.
effects: Aspect of Fire: On shoot, 6% chance to gain Berserk for 6 seconds.Aspect of Water: On ability use, 60% chance to restore +60 MP.Aspect of Air: On ability use, 60% chance to call lightning to 4 targets with shockblasts, dealing 1600 damage.Aspect of Earth: On hit, 80% chance to restore +60 HP. Cooldown: 8 seconds individually
